## How to switch between light and dark mode

1. Log in to your account and click your initials or name in the lower left corner.

2. Navigate to [Settings > Appearance](https://claude.ai/settings/appearance).

3. Select from Light, Match System, and Dark under **Color mode**.

![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/lupk8zyo/1648260417/d478c757c7115ad58a12026d4caf/AD_4nXc__Qop4X9hknWGfGj_y_DCpLutLruhxIclJIfir0ilsgNMg7X8ksIVnqk1Oce5FKlGIOYu9CKbVsu8DqD7iIY2aC0ZfXMyFTeAdNq-Cao2mXcj_WUpNF0kM2HoYR_dEx6N_cuJow?expires=1781747100&amp;signature=2477a424bd19a90678ad12643243136f5b9576203afc05c6a06cb2d79afeb72a&amp;req=dSYjHst4nYVeXvMW1HO4zc2jJ6M6hIzlSBkgeTglJrpj%2FXw%2BFe%2FC3HGRQO10%0AVKtwa%2BiUKu2aBuG9uFU%3D%0A)

## How to change your font

1. In [Settings > Appearance](https://claude.ai/settings/appearance), find **Chat font**.

2. Select from Default, Match System, and Dyslexic Friendly.

![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/lupk8zyo/1648260416/7fc0803d44d8de40f8e6636b2eb6/AD_4nXf0UEDa1i2QmqlQtoB5BgpQ-FfZVzss_7wMVQdvkmEDSfoTxixnG0GSxC6qrOs21HdkXH-I2Yn_GHDAf8yjd6FJtoh9FadALozvIErFp9r8LychDGLPb7OpN1CN4PRcgVAYNCre?expires=1781747100&amp;signature=629c3fe866742526be6e2a7b609aa9c9827da9bbf7f32c664dd6a31e20534760&amp;req=dSYjHst4nYVeX%2FMW1HO4zc8962HiWXY9QtNFlF5%2FHEfJeiSwOmXPpxZ0MvIc%0AqFRt7I47IssoygXOJ8k%3D%0A)

## Can I disable the sidebar?

It's not currently possible to completely disable the sidebar. You can click the button on the top right of the sidebar to open or close it.

![](https://downloads.intercomcdn.com/i/o/lupk8zyo/1941108004/5217903737ddd9bb62fe5d7a904c/CleanShot+2026-01-14+at+09_12_58.png?expires=1781747100&amp;signature=d093b883b5fd520ae8807e1ffec501ce7fbefa8dd3c79147368f251d33bb695e&amp;req=dSkjF8h%2BlYFfXfMW1HO4zUS%2BB17xXXzuylfYa7uDb9lMYPAFpjwv0%2Fdc6yJW%0Atlkpq0EnpXXBGV8CCsc%3D%0A)
